parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the isi sensor driver config

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the sensor mode list

briefdescription.para: Gets the name of sensor which is connected to FPGA i2c-8/9/10/11.

detaileddescription.para: Currently, only i2c-8/9 query is supported.
